rulesets.title: rules-kotlin
rulesets.description: Kotlin/Android security governance rules for AI coding agents. Blocks force non-null assertions that cause NPEs, SQL string interpolation, Java deserialization (RCE), command injection via Runtime.exec(), hardcoded credentials, unsafe unchecked casts, and cleartext HTTP in production.

rulesets.title: rules-kubernetes
rulesets.description: Kubernetes manifest governance rules for AI coding agents. Prevents privileged containers, root user execution, hardcoded secrets in env vars, wildcard RBAC, missing health probes, and untagged images — enforcing Kubernetes security best practices at the agent tool-call boundary.

rulesets.title: rules-llama-4

rulesets.title: rules-llamaindex

rulesets.title: rules-llm
rulesets.description: LLM and AI API governance rules for AI coding agents. rulesets.title: rules-logstash

rulesets.title: rules-macos
rulesets.description: macOS security and safety governance rules for AI coding agents. Blocks disabling SIP, Gatekeeper bypass, TCC permission reset, osascript admin escalation, NVRAM security settings, Keychain dump, firewall disable, LaunchDaemon persistence, ATS bypass, and sandbox disabling.

rulesets.title: rules-mariadb

rulesets.title: rules-prolog
rulesets.description: Prolog is a logic programming language associated with artificial intelligence and computational linguistics. These rules govern declarative logic, pattern matching, and the development of rule-based expert systems.

rulesets.title: rules-prometheus
rulesets.description: Prometheus is an open-source monitoring and alerting toolkit originally built at SoundCloud. These rules govern metrics collection, PromQL query optimization, and system observability for AI agents.

rulesets.title: rules-pulumi
rulesets.description: Pulumi is an infrastructure as code platform that allows you to use familiar programming languages to manage cloud resources. These rules govern resource provisioning, state management, and infrastructure automation.

rulesets.title: rules-puppet
rulesets.description: Puppet is an open-source software configuration management tool that automates infrastructure management. These rules govern system state enforcement, automated configuration, and infrastructure scalability.

rulesets.title: rules-puppeteer
rulesets.description: Puppeteer is a Node library which provides a high-level API to control Chrome or Chromium over the DevTools Protocol. These rules govern headless browser automation, web scraping, and automated UI testing.

rulesets.title: rules-python
rulesets.description: Python is an interpreted, high-level, general-purpose programming language known for its readability. These rules govern idiomatic coding practices, environment management, and core library usage.

rulesets.title: rules-pytorch
rulesets.description: PyTorch is an open-source machine learning library based on the Torch library. These rules govern tensor computation, deep learning model architecture, and GPU-accelerated training.

rulesets.title: rules-qdrant
rulesets.description: Qdrant is a vector similarity search engine that provides a production-ready service with a convenient API. These rules govern vector storage, collection management, and high-performance neural search.

rulesets.title: rules-qt
rulesets.description: Qt is a cross-platform application development framework for creating graphical user interfaces and cross-platform applications. These rules govern GUI design, signal-slot communication, and C++ application structure.

rulesets.title: rules-qwik
rulesets.description: Qwik is a web framework designed for building instant-loading applications with a focus on resumability. These rules govern performance optimizations and idiomatic component design for AI-assisted Qwik development.

rulesets.title: rules-r
rulesets.description: R is a programming language and environment for statistical computing and graphics. These rules govern data analysis workflows, package management, and statistical modeling best practices for AI agents.

rulesets.title: rules-radix-ui
rulesets.description: Radix UI is an open-source library of unstyled, accessible UI primitives for building design systems. These rules govern accessible component implementation and integration patterns for AI-assisted frontend development.

rulesets.title: rules-react
rulesets.description: React is a JavaScript library for building user interfaces based on components. These rules govern hook usage, state management, and component lifecycle best practices for AI agents.

rulesets.title: rules-react-native
rulesets.description: React Native is a framework for building native mobile applications using React. These rules govern mobile-specific patterns, bridge interactions, and cross-platform UI development for AI-assisted mobile engineering.

rulesets.title: rules-redis
rulesets.description: Redis is an in-memory data structure store used as a database, cache, and message broker. These rules govern efficient data modeling, command usage, and performance tuning for AI agents interacting with Redis.

rulesets.title: rules-relay
rulesets.description: Relay is a production-ready GraphQL client for React designed for performance and scalability. These rules govern fragment-driven development and efficient data fetching patterns for AI-assisted Relay integration.

rulesets.title: rules-remix
rulesets.description: Remix is a full-stack web framework focused on Web Standards and modern user experiences. These rules govern loader/action patterns, routing, and progressive enhancement best practices for AI agents.

rulesets.title: rules-rollup
rulesets.description: Rollup is a module bundler for JavaScript that compiles small pieces of code into something larger and more complex. These rules govern plugin configuration and efficient bundling strategies for AI-assisted build processes.

rulesets.title: rules-rspack
rulesets.description: Rspack is a high-performance JavaScript bundler written in Rust, compatible with the webpack ecosystem. These rules govern build optimizations and migration patterns for AI-assisted RSPack configuration.

rulesets.title: rules-ruby
rulesets.description: Ruby is a dynamic, open-source programming language with a focus on simplicity and productivity. These rules govern idiomatic Ruby patterns and Rails integration best practices for AI agents.

rulesets.title: rules-rust
rulesets.description: Rust is a systems programming language focused on safety, speed, and concurrency. These rules govern memory management, ownership patterns, and idiomatic Rust development for AI agents — including filesystem-safety lessons learned from the Canonical/Zellic audit of rust-coreutils (CVE-2026-35338..35381).

rulesets.title: rules-saltstack
rulesets.description: SaltStack is an IT automation and configuration management tool. These rules govern state management, orchestration, and infrastructure-as-code patterns for AI-assisted system administration.

rulesets.title: rules-scala
rulesets.description: Scala is a high-level language that combines object-oriented and functional programming. These rules govern type-safe development and functional programming patterns for AI-assisted Scala engineering.

rulesets.title: rules-scikit-learn
rulesets.description: scikit-learn is a Python library for machine learning providing simple and efficient tools for data analysis. These rules govern model selection, feature engineering, and pipeline construction for AI-assisted machine learning.

rulesets.title: rules-scipy
rulesets.description: SciPy is a Python-based ecosystem of open-source software for mathematics, science, and engineering. These rules govern numerical integration, optimization, and scientific computing best practices for AI agents.

rulesets.title: rules-seaborn
rulesets.description: Seaborn is a Python data visualization library based on matplotlib that provides a high-level interface for drawing attractive statistical graphics. These rules govern idiomatic visualization patterns and statistical plotting for AI agents.

rulesets.title: rules-secrets
rulesets.description: These rules govern the management, protection, and handling of sensitive information such as API keys and credentials. They ensure AI agents maintain high security standards and prevent accidental exposure of secrets.

rulesets.title: rules-security
rulesets.description: These rules govern general security best practices, vulnerability prevention, and secure coding standards. They provide a framework for AI agents to develop and maintain secure software systems.

rulesets.title: rules-sequelize
rulesets.description: Sequelize is a promise-based Node.js ORM for various SQL databases. These rules govern data modeling, associations, and query optimization for AI-assisted database interactions.

rulesets.title: rules-solidity
rulesets.description: Solidity is an object-oriented, high-level language for implementing smart contracts on blockchain platforms. These rules govern security patterns and idiomatic contract development for AI-assisted blockchain engineering.

rulesets.title: rules-solidjs
rulesets.description: SolidJS is a declarative JavaScript library for building user interfaces with a focus on fine-grained reactivity. These rules govern reactive patterns and efficient component design for AI-assisted SolidJS development.

rulesets.title: rules-spinnaker
rulesets.description: Spinnaker is an open-source, multi-cloud continuous delivery platform. These rules govern pipeline orchestration and deployment strategies for AI-assisted cloud operations.

rulesets.title: rules-splunk
rulesets.description: Splunk is a platform for searching, monitoring, and analyzing machine-generated big data. These rules govern query optimization (SPL) and dashboarding best practices for AI-assisted data analysis.

rulesets.title: rules-sql
rulesets.description: SQL is the standard language for relational database management. These rules govern query design, indexing strategies, and relational data modeling for AI-assisted database management.

rulesets.title: rules-sqlite
rulesets.description: SQLite is a lightweight, disk-based database engine. These rules govern efficient embedded database usage and SQL optimization for AI agents.

rulesets.title: rules-storybook
rulesets.description: Storybook is a frontend workshop for building UI components in isolation. These rules govern component documentation and testing patterns for AI-assisted UI development.

rulesets.title: rules-supabase
rulesets.description: Supabase is an open-source Firebase alternative providing a suite of backend tools. These rules govern database configuration, authentication, and real-time integration for AI-assisted application development.

rulesets.title: rules-svelte
rulesets.description: Svelte is a framework that compiles UI components into highly efficient imperative code. These rules govern store management and idiomatic Svelte patterns for AI-assisted development.

rulesets.title: rules-swift
rulesets.description: Swift is a powerful and intuitive programming language for Apple platforms. These rules govern idiomatic Swift patterns and app architecture best practices for AI agents.

rulesets.title: rules-tailwindcss
rulesets.description: Tailwind CSS is a utility-first CSS framework for rapid UI development. These rules govern dynamic class construction safety, configuration best practices, and purging optimization for AI agents.

rulesets.title: rules-tauri
rulesets.description: Tauri is a framework for building small, fast, and secure desktop applications with web technologies and Rust. These rules govern security isolation, IPC communication, and system capability management for AI agents.

rulesets.title: rules-tekton
rulesets.description: Tekton is a powerful and flexible open-source framework for creating CI/CD systems on Kubernetes. These rules govern pipeline security, task definition safety, and resource management for AI agents.

rulesets.title: rules-tensorflow
rulesets.description: TensorFlow is a comprehensive open-source platform for machine learning and artificial intelligence. These rules govern model loading safety, computational resource management, and API best practices for AI agents.

rulesets.title: rules-terraform
rulesets.description: Terraform is an infrastructure as code tool for building, changing, and versioning infrastructure safely and efficiently. These rules govern security configurations, credential safety, and infrastructure best practices for AI agents.

rulesets.title: rules-testing
rulesets.description: A collection of general testing rules applicable across various frameworks and languages. These rules govern test suite reliability, blocking focused tests, and ensuring assertion integrity for AI agents.

rulesets.title: rules-transformers
rulesets.description: Transformers provides state-of-the-art machine learning models for natural language processing, computer vision, and audio. These rules govern model loading safety, tokenizer usage, and resource management for AI agents.

rulesets.title: rules-travisci
rulesets.description: Travis CI is a continuous integration service used to build and test software projects hosted on GitHub and Bitbucket. These rules govern build configuration security and secret handling for AI agents.

rulesets.title: rules-trpc
rulesets.description: tRPC is a framework for building end-to-end typesafe APIs without code generation. These rules govern procedure definition safety, input validation, and API best practices for AI agents.

rulesets.title: rules-tsup
rulesets.description: tsup is a zero-config TypeScript bundler powered by esbuild. These rules govern build configuration safety and bundle optimization best practices for AI agents.

rulesets.title: rules-typeorm
rulesets.description: TypeORM is an ORM that can run in NodeJS, Browser, and other platforms, supporting TypeScript and JavaScript. These rules govern query safety, migration integrity, and relationship best practices for AI agents.

rulesets.title: rules-typescript
rulesets.description: TypeScript is a strongly typed programming language that builds on JavaScript. These rules govern type safety, vulnerability prevention, and idiomatic coding patterns for AI agents.

rulesets.title: rules-ubuntu
rulesets.description: Ubuntu is a popular Linux distribution based on Debian. These rules govern system security, administrative safety, and configuration best practices for AI agents.

rulesets.title: rules-vagrant
rulesets.description: Vagrant is a tool for building and managing virtual machine environments in a single workflow. These rules govern VM configuration safety and provisioning best practices for AI agents.

rulesets.title: rules-vault
rulesets.description: HashiCorp Vault is a tool for secrets management, encryption as a service, and privileged access management. These rules govern secret access, policy definitions, and token safety for AI agents.

rulesets.title: rules-vertexai
rulesets.description: Vertex AI is Google Cloud's unified machine learning platform. These rules govern API usage safety, resource provisioning, and model deployment best practices for AI agents.

rulesets.title: rules-vite
rulesets.description: Vite is a frontend build tool that provides a fast and modern development experience. These rules govern dev server security and build optimization best practices for AI agents.

rulesets.title: rules-vitest
rulesets.description: Vitest is a Vite-native unit test framework. These rules govern test suite reliability, hook usage, and best practices for AI agents.

rulesets.title: rules-vlang
rulesets.description: V is a statically typed compiled programming language designed for building maintainable software. These rules govern memory safety, syntax idioms, and compiler safety for AI agents.

rulesets.title: rules-vue
rulesets.description: Vue.js is a progressive JavaScript framework for building user interfaces. These rules govern component structure, reactivity safety, and security best practices for AI agents.

rulesets.title: rules-waypoint
rulesets.description: HashiCorp Waypoint is a tool to build, deploy, and manage applications across any platform. These rules govern deployment configuration safety and application management for AI agents.

rulesets.title: rules-weaviate
rulesets.description: Weaviate is an open-source vector database that allows you to store data objects and vector embeddings. These rules govern schema definitions, query efficiency, and indexing best practices for AI agents.

rulesets.title: rules-webassembly
rulesets.description: WebAssembly is a binary instruction format for a stack-based virtual machine. These rules govern module loading safety and security boundary enforcement for AI agents.

rulesets.title: rules-webgl
rulesets.description: WebGL is a JavaScript API for rendering high-performance interactive 3D and 2D graphics. These rules govern shader safety and resource management for AI agents.

rulesets.title: rules-webpack
rulesets.description: webpack is a static module bundler for modern JavaScript applications. These rules govern plugin safety, security configurations, and build performance for AI agents.

rulesets.title: rules-webrtc
rulesets.description: WebRTC is an open-source project that enables real-time communication in web browsers and mobile applications. These rules govern peer connection safety and media handling for AI agents.

rulesets.title: rules-windows
rulesets.description: Windows is a major family of operating systems developed by Microsoft. These rules govern system security, administrative safety, and configuration best practices for AI agents.

rulesets.title: rules-wrangler
rulesets.description: Wrangler is Cloudflare's CLI for deploying Workers, managing D1, KV, R2, and Durable Objects. These rules protect AI agents from destructive remote-database operations, secrets leakage in wrangler.toml, missing compatibility dates, public-bucket misconfiguration, and production deploys without environment gates.

rulesets.title: rules-xamarin
rulesets.description: Xamarin is an open-source platform for building modern and performant applications for iOS, Android, and Windows with .NET. These rules govern native interop and application security for AI agents.

rulesets.title: rules-xgboost
rulesets.description: XGBoost is an optimized distributed gradient boosting library designed to be highly efficient, flexible and portable. These rules govern model parameter safety and data handling for AI agents.

rulesets.title: rules-yarn
rulesets.description: Yarn is a package manager that doubles as a project manager. These rules govern dependency version pinning and lockfile integrity for AI agents.

rulesets.title: rules-zig
rulesets.description: Zig is a general-purpose programming language and toolchain for maintaining robust, optimal and reusable software. These rules govern memory management safety and coding best practices for AI agents.
